review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify that the new GitBook directory structure (getting-started, core-concepts, guides, reference) was successfully created inside documentation/EN/ and ZH/.
Verify that SUMMARY.md and the root README.md were generated, featuring the 'Triumvirate' concepts and Mermaid diagrams.
Verify that old unstructured markdown files in the documentation root were successfully removed.
Verify NO implementation code (e.g., modifying src/ or bin/) or active state model semantic changes (modifying workflow/dispatch.json) occurred outside of Phase 3 progression.
